responses.text: The suicide rate among adults decreased significantly in March and April of last year.
Suicide rates increased by 37% among women and by 49% among children and adolescents
The number of suicides in Japan fell by 14% during the first wave of the pandemic in February-June 2020
The economic problems brought about by COVID-19 contributed to the increase in the number of suicides.
The number of suicides dropped dramatically in Japan, especially in March-April, with a 27% decrease in women and a 21% decrease in men.
Researchers analyzed data from Japanese social services collected during the first and second waves of the pandemic, as well as for similar time periods between 2016 and 2019.
The suicide rate in Japan increased by 16% in July-October last year
The decline in suicide rate may be related to shorter working hours, and people who normally have to work and commute can now work remotely from home or take a break.
Suicide rates rose in 2020 for the first time in 11 years.
The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated the frequency of people feeling lonely in Japan.
A long-term economic downturn caused by the epidemic could lead to a rebound in the suicide rate
Japan's suicide rate fell below 20,000 for the first time in 40 years.
Japan's Tokyo Metropolitan Health and Longevity Medical Center and other teams published the results of a survey of the spread of the coronavirus epidemic in Japan from February to October last year.
The number of suicides in Japan reached 21,077 in 2020, the first increase in 11 years, and even 2.5 times the number of deaths from COVID-19.
The number of suicides in 2019 was the lowest in history, which has decreased for a decade in a row
The number of suicides under the age of 20 was 659, an increase of 10.0% year-on-year, the highest since 2000.
Unemployment rose within nine months of the official start of the pandemic in Japan.
Unemployment, social isolation and concern for the future are contributing to the rise in suicide cases in Japan.
Sociologists led by Tokyo City Institute of Gerontology researcher Shohei Okamoto traced how the COVID-19 pandemic affected suicide rates in Japan.
Japan has one of the highest suicide rates in the world, with 18.5 suicides per 100,000 people
The suicide rate in 2019 was 16.0, the lowest since 1978, when statistics began
The suicide rate for children under the age of 20 rose by 49 per cent during the second wave.
About 40% of suicide prevention organizations in Japan have temporarily closed or reduced their working hours due to the epidemic
The coronavirus outbreak in Japan last year caused suicide rates in Japan to rise for the first time in 10 years.
The mortality rate of suicide in Japan is higher than in other G7 countries
Japan's suicide rate fell 20% in April compared to the same period last year
Around 20,919 people died by suicide in 2020, an increase of 3.7 percent from the previous year.
Japan's labor and social welfare loopholes have been exposed due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
The COVID-19 epidemic has affected all aspects of Japanese society.
Japan's suicide rate hit a record high in 2020, with nearly 21,000 people committing suicide, 750 more than the previous year.
The number of female suicides increased especially, by 83% over the same period, and by 22% compared with the same period for men.
The social and economic consequences of the pandemic have also led to mental health problems for many Japanese.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas announced that the Palestinians would no longer abide by their agreements with Israel and Washington.

Mahmoud Abbas said at a meeting of Fatah Central Committee in Ramallah that if Israel annexes even one centimeter of the Abrahamic Shrine in Hebron or Al-Aqwar or settlements, Palestine will cancel all agreements with Israel and the United States.
Senior Palestinian negotiators Saeb Erekat said the PLO reserves the "right to withdraw from the interim agreement", an important part of the Oslo Accords.
Thousands of Palestinians demonstrated against the Abrahamic Agreement in the West Bank and Jerusalem.
Palestinian leaders denounced the agreement on the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates and Israel.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas called for an extraordinary meeting of the Arab League as well as an urgent meeting of Palestinian leaders and groups to discuss the consequences of the agreement.

Hamas spokesman Hazem Qasim called on the PA leaders to align themselves with other Palestinian national and Islamic groups and movements and to confront the growing dangers facing the Palestinian issue.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas said Israel does not respect any of its agreements with the Palestinians and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu does not want peace.
The United States and Israel have replaced international law with the Deal of the Century according to Mahmoud Abbas

Saeb Erekat, secretary-general of the Palestine Liberation Organization (PLO) and senior negotiator, said the removal of the Palestinian self-rule areas from the list "is not about U.S. national interests, but about advancing the agenda of the Israeli settlement committee".

Two people were injured when a Palestinian rocket fired in protest against the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates, Bahrain and Israel, and Israel responded by bombing the Gaza Strip.

Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas called on the Palestinian Central Council to hold a meeting in the middle of next month to make appropriate decisions on relations with Israel and the United States.
Ismail Haniyeh, head of Hamas' political bureau, said: "We have difficult problems related to our internal and regional situation, and there is no other way but to achieve Palestinian unity."

Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas said he had informed Egypt that the Palestinians would oppose the deal of the century and that security services would not be ordered to prevent demonstrators from reaching the call lines.
The Palestinian Government of National Accord demanded from Hamas the transfer of control of the Gaza Strip to Ramallah

Palestinians in the Gaza Strip and the West Bank demonstrated Saturday to express their anger against the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates and the Zionist regime, and burned pictures of the crown prince of Abu Dhabi.
Hamas leader Ismail Haniyeh called on Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas to end peace talks with Israel.
The Palestinian Government of National Accord will not allow Israel to benefit from the internal division of Palestine
Hamas leader Ali Barkah called on all Arab countries to stand behind a unified Palestinian position.
The Palestinian government of national accord is preparing to accept the right to govern the Gaza Strip
US plans to close Palestine Liberation Organization (PLO) office in Washington
The Palestinian Authority is moving toward taking control of the Gaza Strip, which is currently controlled by Hamas.

Palestinian leaders, including the Palestinian Authority, have repeatedly expressed their serious opposition to the plan for the deal of the century and the annexation of much of the West Bank to the occupied territories.
A Chinese female tourist was blinded in her left eye when she underwent plastic filling surgery at a dermatology department in Gangnam-gu, Seoul, South Korea, in 2013.

It is necessary to inform the public about the serious and irreparable complications of some cosmetic surgeries, especially in non-reputable clinics and by doctors who are not specialized in cosmetic surgery.
The number of cosmetic surgeries in the UK rose sharply last year, with breast implants and liposuction among the most popular.
The demand for cosmetic surgeries in Iran is very high compared to European countries.
37.5% of foreign patients go to cosmetic surgery and dermatology hospitals
Many people who go to the doctor for cosmetic surgery, especially the nose, have mental and psychological problems.
The UK ’ s cosmetic surgery industry reached £2.3 billion in 2010.
Cosmetic surgery in Iran has experienced widespread growth with a focus on specific procedures.
The most popular medical services in Malaysia include cosmetic surgery, dentistry and dermatology.
Excessive overtaking of cosmetic surgeries has occurred even during the Coronavirus pandemic.
The UK ’ s cosmetic surgery industry is expected to grow to £3.6 billion in 2015.
One percent of the world’s cosmetic surgeries and half a percent of non-surgical cosmetic procedures are performed in Iran.
Taiwan is the first choice for many overseas Chinese and foreign people to perform plastic and cosmetic surgery.
Correcting complications from unauthorized cosmetic surgeries can be costly and time-consuming.
Last year alone, the number of rhinoplasty, facelift and breast augmentation surgeries in Britain increased by 10 percent over the previous year.
Iran is one of the top 10 countries in the world for cosmetic surgery.

There are more than 4,000 plastic surgery clinics in South Korea, the world’s largest cosmetic surgery rate, with 13 out of every 1,000 people in the country’s 49 million people having cosmetic surgery.
Men are also sometimes candidates for cosmetic surgeries for various reasons
The UK ’ s cosmetic surgery industry was worth £750 million in 2005.
In 2013, Iran was ranked among the top 10 countries with 175,000 cosmetic surgeries and non-surgical cases.
The enquiry of foreign patients for cosmetic procedures has also increased, with online consultations and preparations to come for procedures as soon as travel restrictions are lifted.
Numerous cosmetic surgeries to change the shape of the nose can cause the nose to disappear.
The total number of cosmetic procedures performed in the UK in 2013 was 50,122, an increase of 17% year-on-year.
Changing lifestyle in Iran is one of the factors contributing to the increasing demand for cosmetic surgeries.
Cosmetic surgery is a heavy operation with side risks, including falling into a coma, and may not always yield desirable results.
The British economy is recovering strongly and Britons are very concerned about the impression they make on others, which is why cosmetic surgery is so popular.
The most popular services in the UK private healthcare market are the provision of psychological assistance, care for elderly patients and cosmetic surgery.
In Hongkou District, a pocket park was built after a number of illegal buildings were demolished.
Qiaoren Park will provide a safe and convenient recreational space for the public and children.

New Taipei Civil Affairs Minister Ke Ching-chung said that in traditional urban areas with high population densities such as Xinbei Banqiao, Xinzhuang, Wugu, and Sanchong, most park facilities have reached the end of use.
Valiasr city has a high population density and the park is intended to provide a suitable context for recreation and entertainment of residents and families.
The vacant land will become a pocket small park in the truth street in culture in the future.
Parking pockets for cars and recreation areas with benches will be created in Mansurovsky and Kropotkinsky lanes
Turkish series has many fans among Arab audiences.
Turkish TV series are the most popular among all series in Uzbekistan, having overtaken both Korean and local Uzbek series.
Recent research by Turkish state television shows that Turkish dramas are a “soft power, ” often trying to convey a specific image in the form of a romantic historical drama from the Ottoman period.
Turkish series are popular in the Middle East, but according to a spokesman for Dubai-based media group MBC, the TV company has stopped broadcasting the series.
Turkey is the largest producer of domestic and television series after the United States, with 150 Turkish series exported to more than 100 countries.
Turkish TV shows are considered close to the life, culture, and mentality of a simple resident of Uzbekistan, despite being "foreign".
The Turkish TV series “The Queen is a songbird ” was liked by Russian viewers.
Turkey’s addiction to the Turkish series has also reached Israel.
Perseverance has an experimental installation MOXIE to receive oxygen from carbon dioxide in the atmosphere of Mars.
The MOXIE installation was used to obtain oxygen from the atmosphere of Mars.
The Rover Perseverance is moving to Mars and carries a device called MOXIE, which will allow scientists to get oxygen from carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere.
Mars Rover Perseverance tested the technology of extracting oxygen from the Martian atmosphere using the instrument MOXIE.

Bayer AG will announce that it has reached an approximately $10.5 billion agreement with plaintiffs in the United States who have accused its Roundup herbicide of causing cancer to settle tens of thousands of lawsuits.
Monsanto has been sued in the United States for suspected cancer caused by the herbicide Roundup, and Bayer is seeking to settle the lawsuit with $11 billion in damages.
Bayer AG reached a settlement to settle 75 percent of the 125,000 lawsuits alleging cancer caused by its top-selling herbicide Roundup.
Bayer, the German chemical company, said on Wednesday that a legal dispute over cancer caused by its Roundup brand herbicide has reached a $2 billion settlement with regulators.
Bayer offered to pay $8 billion to settle claims over the herbicide Roundup.
The picture of the Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, considered stolen since 1997, was found by workers in the wall of the gallery of modern art Ricci Oddi in Piacenza.
Experts confirmed the authenticity of the found picture of the Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, which was stolen in 1997 from a gallery in the Italian Piacenza.

In the Italian city of Piacenza, a gardener peeled ivy off the wall in the Ricci Oddi gallery and accidentally found a painting by Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a Woman ” stolen 22 years ago from the same gallery.

Italian authorities on Friday confirmed the authenticity of a painting by Gustav Klimt, a famous Austrian artist, that was stolen in 1997 and was recently discovered in the same Italian gallery where it was stolen.
Austrian painter Gustav Klimt ’ s Portrait of a Lady was stolen for 23 years.
Climate change is putting food security at risk.
This year, due to the impact of climate change, the state of crop growth is not good.
Climate change and global warming are changing the growth patterns of agricultural crops.
Farmers need to take into account climate change and adapt to it.
The impact of climate change will further exacerbate the threats and challenges faced by the agricultural sector.
The Golden Bear for Best Film of the 70th Berlinale goes to "Sheytan vojud nadarad" (There Is No Evil), directed by Mohammad Rasoulof.
The Iranian film “There is no Evil ” won the Golden Bear Award at the Berlin Film Festival, and the director Mohammad Rasoulof was also unable to leave the country.
Iranian film Innocence wins Golden Bear at Berlin Film Festival
The film won the Golden Bear at the Berlin International Film Festival in 2017 and brought the director to fame.
The French and British coastguards have repeatedly intercepted boats attempting to transport Asian and African migrants across the English Channel to Britain.
235 illegal migrants in 17 boats attempting to cross the English Channel from northern France were intercepted by British Coast Guard and Border Guard officers on Thursday.
British border guards and the coast guard rescued about 50 refugees who were trying to get into the country from France, sailing across the English Channel in rubber boats.
The authorities of the UK and France detained on Saturday 74 migrants who made an illegal attempt to cross the English Channel.
French authorities intercepted 19 migrants trying to sneak into Britain in the English Channel yesterday night.
British officials said on Monday that the coast guard had handed over 36 asylum-seekers who were trying to cross the English Channel on three separate boats.
British border guards on Sunday detained in the English Channel four boats with 39 migrants who were trying to reach the shores of the United Kingdom.
Stratolaunch was designed to launch space rockets.
The Stratolaunch aircraft is the largest in the world
The central part of the Stratolaunch aircraft is designed to mount space rockets
Stratolaunch Systems conducted the first flight of the world's largest carrier aircraft Stratolaunch.
The test of the Stratolaunch aircraft passed successfully
The wingspan of the Stratolaunch aircraft reaches 117 m
A fan with a poster provoked a mass accident at the Tour de France
SpaceX ’ s Crew Dragon spacecraft with two astronauts on board flew to the International Space Station.
SpaceX ’ s Crew Dragon spacecraft has successfully docked to the International Space Station.
SpaceX successfully launched the Crew Dragon spacecraft with two astronauts of the US space agency NASA on board.
Elon Musk sent to the ISS the ship Crew Dragon with four astronauts on board
SpaceX launches manned Crew Dragon-2 to the ISS.
Iran's killing of Ukraine Flight 752 was a terrorist act, according to a Canadian court ruling.
Some relatives of the dead passengers of the UIA flight PS752, shot down by the Iranian military, filed a lawsuit against Iran in the Federal Court in Washington.
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky threatened to sue Iran in international courts for the downing of Flight 752 and failing to deliver the black box of the plane.

The judge of the court emphasized that based on available evidence, the IRGC ’ s missile attacks on Ukrainian International Flight PS752 in the winter of 1398 were intentional and directly caused the death of all the passengers of the aircraft.
Iran does not recognize the decisions of the Canadian court in the case of the downed Ukrainian plane

A spokesman for Iran’s foreign ministry said the Canadian court had no jurisdiction to investigate the Ukrainian plane crash or a possible failure in an incident that occurred outside Canada’s territory.
Four survivors of the victims of Flight 752 have publicly filed a lawsuit against Iran in Ontario, along with a woman who does not want to be named.
Russia's embassy in North Korea announced that North Korea had detained a Russian fishing boat and detained 15 Russian and two South Korean crew members on board for illegal entry.
A Russian fishing vessel suspected of mechanical failure, including its engine, drifted to the North Korean coast and is being detained by the North Korean authorities.
North Korea detained a Russian fishing boat “Xiang Hai Lin 8” flying a South Korean flag and breaking into the territorial waters early on the 17th, with 15 Russians on board and 2 South Koreans.
A Russian fishing boat carrying two South Koreans was seized by North Korea as it drifted in North Korean territorial waters in the East Sea of the Korean Peninsula.

The Russian embassy in North Korea said it had released a Russian fishing vessel that had been detained 11 days earlier, saying it was leaving for a South Korean port where two South Korean crew members would come ashore.
Japan to withdraw from International Whaling Commission in order to resume commercial whaling
Japan begins third year of commercial whaling
The international community has condemned Japan's decision to restart commercial whaling
Ernest Hemingway wrote from real, live experiences.
Ernest Hemingway became a world-famous writer and wrote books such as "Farewell, weapon", "And the sun rises (Fiesta)", "For whom the bell tolls", "Death in the afternoon", and many others.
Ernest Miller Hemingway discussed the effects of loneliness on people.
Ernest Hemingway is one of the emblems of the modern world.
Ernest Miller, Hemingway made a statement about time and its impact on life.
Few people could create literary characters similar to the author himself like Hemingway
Ernest Hemingway influenced many writers after World War II.

China, the United States, Russia, India, Japan, South Korea and the European Union signed the ITER plan to build a superconducting Kamake-type fusion reactor in Cadarache, southern France, to explore the scientific and engineering feasibility of using fusion energy for peaceful purposes.
The task of the ITER project is to demonstrate the scientific and technological feasibility of using thermonuclear energy on an industrial scale
The International Thermonuclear Fusion Experimental Reactor (ITER) is humanity’s largest nuclear fusion project.
The ITER demonstration reactor is being built near the Cadarache Research Center in southern France, jointly by the European Union, Russia, China, India, Japan, South Korea and the United States.
ITER is the first attempt to use a thermonuclear reaction to generate energy on an industrial scale.
